name: element_title
label: Element title
help_text: Examples: Thin Border, Color Fade Effect, Curved Shapes, Dark Overlays.

name: element_body
label: What this element is
default: 3-4 pixel borders that frame content without becoming a design element in their own right. Used for cards, image frames, and quote pull-outs.
help_text: 1-2 paragraphs explaining the element and its rules.

name: where_to_use
label: Where to use this (optional callout)
default: Where it works: Cards, photo frames, quote callouts, section dividers.
